market_overview.headline: Both SPY and QQQ show bearish EMA structures with prices below all key averages, while BTC remains in deep bear territory.
market_overview.detail: With 30% of stocks in Full Bear signals and both major indices unstacked bearishly, the market is showing clear deterioration despite 27% still in Full Bull trends.

momentum_themes.headline: Memory & Storage Leading Tech Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Memory semiconductor stocks dominating momentum rankings with SNDK, WDC, and MU leading explosive moves. Energy minerals showing perfect bullish structure across all names.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy vs. Tech Services Divergence Widens

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure across all 11 names with strong average gains
Metals and mining showing universal bullish trends in commodity supercycle
Infrastructure and industrial plays maintaining perfect bullish alignment

weakest.note: Software sector devastated with 19 of 21 names in bear structures
Business services showing complete bearish breakdown across the board
Banking and financial services under pressure with 61 of 101 names bearish

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into defensive value and commodities. Energy and materials showing explosive strength while software collapses.

items.text: Major indices breaking down with SPY and QQQ both in bearish unstacked structures
Technology services sector showing 90% bearish participation - avoid broad tech exposure
BTC deep bear structure at -45% below fair value suggests crypto contagion risk
36 Bull Breakdowns signal potential trend reversals in formerly strong names
